tests.name: valid_double_blink
tests.description: Two valid blinks (25 samples each, 300ms gap) → next_track

tests.name: single_blink_no_trigger
tests.description: One valid blink, then 1.5s silence (>1.0s window) → no action

tests.name: mixed_valid_noise
tests.description: One valid blink (25 samples) + one noise (5 samples) → no action

tests.name: boundary_minimum_duration
tests.description: Two blinks at minimum valid duration (13 samples each) → next_track
